form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Resuming from last on the turn second last of 8 at Ipswich Bm65 on March 6 over 1200m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Heroic Chief with 57.5kg at $21. Last start 3rd in a small field at Ipswich Cl5 on March 26 over 1350m, 2.5 len behind Nightcapped carrying 54kg at $5.50. Good effort last start and can build on that performance.
